_orchestrator_comment: Three-node baremetal example. Same shape as cluster.json but with 3 entries in node_dict. The canonical 'tri-shape' reference for tests that exercise multi-node fanout.
_head_comment: Head node. mgmt_ip MUST match one of the keys in node_dict; the first node here is conventional but not required.
_node_comment: Three cluster members. For multi-node fanout (MPI, RCCL, RVS LEVEL on >1 node) ensure all 6 ordered SSH pairs are functional: 1->2, 1->3, 2->1, 2->3, 3->1, 3->2.
